dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The fluorescent lights of the classroom hummed, a dull, constant drone that mirrored my existence.

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: Another day. Another blur of faces that don't see me.

dialogue.speaker: CLASSMATE A
dialogue.line: Hey, Siyoon. Can I borrow your notes? I missed class yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: Oh, uh, sure.

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: They only ever talk to me when they need something. Am I just a walking textbook?

dialogue.speaker: CLASSMATE A
dialogue.line: Thanks! You're a lifesaver!

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: (Muttering) A lifesaver for your grades, maybe.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Lunch break. The cafeteria was a cacophony of laughter and chatter, none of it directed at me.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLATTER

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: Just me and my half-eaten sandwich, a monument to social awkwardness.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The day dragged on, a monotonous cycle of invisibility and quiet despair. But there was always an escape.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DOOR CREAK

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: Home. Finally. The only place I can truly be myself. Or, rather, become someone else.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I changed into my pajamas, the soft fabric a familiar comfort. The world outside could wait.

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: Just a few more hours until I can truly live.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHEETS RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Darkness enveloped me, a gentle embrace. And then, the shift.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: (Dreaming) The air is different here. Crisp. Alive. And I... I'm different.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I stood on a towering skyscraper, the city lights twinkling below like scattered diamonds. My hair whipped around me, not limp and dull, but vibrant, free.

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: No one can touch me here. No one can ignore me.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WIND WHISTLE

dialogue.speaker: MYSTERIOUS FIGURE
dialogue.line: Enjoying the view, Siyoon?

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: (Startled, but not afraid) You... You're here again.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He emerged from the shadows, a silhouette against the moon. Tall, impossibly handsome, with eyes that held a dangerous glint.

dialogue.speaker: MYSTERIOUS FIGURE
dialogue.line: Where else would I be? This is your stage, isn't it? Your freedom.

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: It is. And you're... a part of it.

dialogue.speaker: MYSTERIOUS FIGURE
dialogue.line: Tell me, Siyoon. What do you truly desire in this world of yours?

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: To be seen. To be powerful. To make them regret.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A slow, predatory smile spread across his face. He reached out, his fingers brushing my cheek, sending a jolt through me.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP-THUMP (heartbeat)

dialogue.speaker: MYSTERIOUS FIGURE
dialogue.line: Then let's make it happen. Together.

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: (Gasp) Yes...

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ALARM BLARE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The harsh reality of my alarm clock shattered the illusion. The vibrant city faded, replaced by my faded wallpaper.

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: No... Not yet. Just a little longer...

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GROAN

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But the dream was gone, leaving behind only a lingering warmth on my cheek where his hand had been.

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: It felt so real. He felt so real.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As I got ready for school, the world seemed duller, colder. The memory of his eyes, however, stayed with me.

dialogue.speaker: SIYOON
dialogue.line: Who is he? And why does he only exist when I close my eyes?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Little did I know, the lines between my two worlds were about to blur in ways I couldn't possibly imagine.

summary: Siyoon endures another day of being invisible and bullied at school, finding her only escape and true self in vivid dreams where she is powerful and meets a mysterious, alluring figure. Waking up, she longs for her dream world, unaware that the boundaries between her reality and dreams are about to collapse.
